narrative:
Keene / Millcreek (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,283 registered voters, with 47.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.9 percentage points.
